value.label: Value proposition
value.title: Train with intelligence
value.text: This is not just a class website or a routine catalog. It's a space for women seeking a smarter, more respectful and effective way to train.
value.item1: Strengthen your body in a balanced way
value.item2: Take care of your core and improve stability
value.item3: Gain body control and movement awareness
value.item5: Feel better in your body, with more strength and wellness

about.label: About Tania
about.title: Hi, I'm Tania Angulo
about.text1: I created this space to support women who want to feel stronger, more connected to their body and more confident in the way they train.
about.text2: My approach combines transformative movement to help you strengthen your body from the core, improve body control and move with more intelligence and wellness.

hero.title: About me
hero.subtitle: I support women in strengthening their body, caring for their core and reconnecting with their wellness.

story.label: My story
story.title: Hi, I'm Tania Angulo
story.text1: I created this space to support women who want to feel stronger, more connected to their body and more confident in the way they train.
story.text2: My approach combines transformative movement to help you strengthen your body from the core, improve body control and move with more intelligence and wellness.
story.text3: I don't believe in training out of obligation or following meaningless routines. I believe in movement that helps you know yourself better, take care of yourself and build real, useful and sustainable strength over time.

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.title: My vision
philosophy.text: I believe in intelligent, respectful and effective training. Each session is designed to help you connect with your body, strengthen your core and build real wellness.

approach.label: My approach
approach.title: Much more than movement
approach.subtitle: My work focuses on guiding you through a practice that combines technique, body awareness and wellness.
approach.pilates.desc: Strengthen your core, improve posture and develop body control with precise, conscious exercises.
approach.strength.desc: Work on strength, endurance, stability and fluidity with functional and effective exercises.
approach.movement.desc: Sessions focused on mobility, coordination, body connection and integral wellness.
approach.center.desc: Strengthen your core as the foundation of all movement: balance, control and body presence.
approach.wellness.desc: Not just quick results. Build a healthier, stronger and more connected relationship with your body.

hero.label: Accessibility
hero.title: Accessibility Statement
hero.subtitle: Our commitment to a web accessible to everyone.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.text: Tania Angulo is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people of all abilities. We are continually improving the user experience for all our visitors and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

standards.title: Conformance standard
standards.text: This website aims to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 Level AA from the W3C. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities and more user-friendly for everyone.

measures.title: Measures implemented
measures.item1: Semantic HTML with correct heading structure and landmark regions.
measures.item2: Descriptive alternative text on all images.
measures.item3: Full keyboard navigation with visible focus indicators.
measures.item4: Color contrast that meets WCAG 2.2 AA minimum ratios.
measures.item5: Accessibility options panel with text size, high contrast, dark mode, reduced motion, focus highlighting, and link underlining.
measures.item7: Responsive design that adapts to different devices and screen sizes.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.text: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of this website. If you encounter any accessibility barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us:
feedback.response: We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within 5 business days.

date.title: Date
date.text: This statement was last updated on March 18, 2026.
